reviews.review_description: Give OculusGo controller support and we ll be ok
Does not install. I want my money back. Also, reviews are locked at 5 stars. What a joke. This is actually a very negative review (zero stars).

Great concept it is a shooting aliens game some people don't know this but it's pretty cool  but save your amo there is not enough amo in this game keep getting killed because no amo so please make it were you have more amo but other then that it pretty cool I love alien games and movies so keep them coming I payed for this game so people that think this is scary aliens it's not but have not got far enough to say that but I will keep you posted if I get farther in the game but good job on this game was very happy with my purchase keep them coming

Ok so the trailer kinda promisses an engaging game with a plot and a city to roam . What you get on the other hand is a static scene so similar to the free zombie room shooter found in store here but with less zombie variations where you try to keep them from advancing in on you or they play you like a piano or so the animation suggests. They say the scene changes eventually but I never reached that far because once you are dead you have to start all over...
Please add gear VR controller support

This is a nice shooting game with a few scares!!  
Works well on my note 4.  Keep up the great work Devs.  And thanks for the note 4 support.

reviews.review_title: Good Game and Fun to Play!
reviews.review_description:
This game is much better to play and enjoy. Graphics are good and it is a challenging game which you have to play actively and fight against waves of mobs. Shooting mobs is working fine after recent update and gameplay is smooth. Goodluck in buying this. 

Tip: Always upgrade weapon after each wave and keep sufficient ammos because you will die in one hit :)

My setup: S7 + Gear VR 2016 + Ipega Controller.

reviews.review_title: Dont know if I like it
reviews.review_description: I keep trying to like it but the graphics I dont like and its kind of simple.. I'm not a best gamer,  however, I do like VR alot and I think its is the next big thing far as gaming... please upgrade quality add co-OP n better missions.. also I hate the 1hit kill of my player

This game feels so amateurish on the technical side... but man does it do some things really well. For beginners, the sound of the guns is probably the best in any VR game. They are loud and powerful. 

The gameplay is fun, the shooting and bullet time never get old, but too bad it's basically just a demo. The war of the world's type of alien with the long legs in the first level is so scary. And that last level is really well made. Those long corridors with the dim lights are freaky, and even more when you see those slow walking aliens coming towards you.

Really wish it was a full game, the dev seems to understand shooting and atmosphere in VR. Hope you continue working in VR.
Good concept but it suddenly gets boring after a few minutes.
Graphics are sub par. There are better experiences on Oculus. Why would they even mislead us?

I figured I give this a try since I'm a fan of rail shooters. It isn't a bad game, but isn't a great game. You kinda get what you paid for I suppose. The graphics are okay, could be a bit better. The game is challenging, that I will give you. Had the game for a few days and still haven't beaten Chapter 3. But to see that there's only 3 chapters is a bit of a bummer. 

Overall, it's a decent game to pass time if you don't want to drop the dough for Drop Dead

This is a fun and challenging stationary wave shooter.  It lacks a bit of polish and only has 3 levels but its difficulty adds longevity.  Shoot aliens to get points then spend those points on better weapons, ammo and grenades.

The game strikes a great balance between creating tension and making the player feel powerful. Although the VR shooter market is saturated, the purge day does enough to differentiate itself from other games through its tension and truly horrific experiences. The last chapter espically keeps you on edge for the entirity of its waves.

I had on my Note 4 no Perormance Problems, but for my opinion the game is NOT worth the money.

The grafics are only average (maybe less than that), you can't move (at each location you are  standing the whole time at the same place), you only look around and search for arieving aliens. 

The Hitbox Behaviour of the aliens is not correct, sometimes you hit them but that has no effect.

I am used to play shooters for many, many years, but this game ist too difficult.
It shurely is too difficult, to kill enough Monsters to get enough money to buy more weapons.

Finally: there are existing a lot of games for free or the same price, which are definetely better!

reviews.review_title: I want to like this more, has potential
reviews.review_description: It's an interesting game that feels more like a beta than anything else, an early release.  The controls are a bit wonky on the Go, the developers need to fix that so we can actually use other weapons correctly (like grenades) and aim using the controller and not just your head.  I'd like to see some revisions to this, it could be so much more.  I'll still play it, but I'd like to see the developers put more time into it.
